subcodes.first_line: Certain peoples of the world have endeavored to speak in their own particular languages, and they have deemed this effort to be the cause of their elevation and exaltation

subcodes.subjects: @universal language, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal peace; world unity, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
